children.text: Store and sync files to Kdan Cloud
Upload your files with a single tap
Create links to files and share them with others
Read and manager documents directly from your browser
Make the Best of PDF Reader

Register now and get 500GB of free space on Kdan Cloud. 
 Get full access to all of these mobile apps, service packs, and more.
Tap to start scanning. You can scan with Camera or import documents from Gallery, then covert them into a multi-page PDF.
You will see five buttons listed on the toolbar, including Search, Layout, Edit, New Folder, and Sort.
